THE ENGINE 1ST STOPPED 2 WEEKS AGO AT A RED LIGHT.  I SAY "STOPPED" BECAUSE THAT IS EXACTLY WHAT IT DID "STOP," NO WARNING LIGHT OR SIGNAL. IT SIMPLY STOPPED. HAD TO GET PUSHED OFF THE ROAD. STARTED AFTER 15-20 MIN. TOOK IT TO MECHANIC, FOUND NOTHING WRONG. SENSORS, GAS, ELECTRIC

narrative.headline: What 2014 Hyundai Accent owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 79 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (32% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: Las luz de ABS comenzó a verse encendida en el Dashboard en ocasiones la de ABS junto a la de Emergencia. Lleve el auto a inspeccionar en el diagnostico resultó que el problema posiblemente podría estar en el HECU. Me indican que lo llevara en esos días porque al ser algo complej
